title: rubus × transalpinus
intro: Rubus × transalpinus, also known as the Transalpine Raspberry, is a hybrid plant species derived from the cross between Rubus idaeus (Wild Raspberry) and Rubus fruticosus (Blackberry). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in its high anthocyanin content, which is responsible for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × transalpinus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting cognitive function due to its rich content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being and vitality.
